calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

John P. Zanghi for the Caritas Management Corp. Witness Grivel Mora-Rogers was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Karl Craig.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 275 10th Street, # 408, San Francisco, CA 94103.
The lease is forfeited.

Holdover Damages - $404.26
Costs - $365.00
Total - $769.26

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Hugo Sandoval.
Attorney John P. Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Karl Craig is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JAN-23-2012 remains on calendar.
